description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding cabinet with a modern, urban design. The front features three distinct panels: two lighter wood doors on either side and a central darker panel, likely a door or drawer, all with small round handles. The top, sides, and back are finished in a medium brown wood grain, giving it a natural yet contemporary appearance. The cabinet stands on short, sturdy metal legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. The construction suggests it is made primarily of wood, with metal hardware and legs, and possibly some internal shelving. Its clean lines and neutral tones make it suitable for use in urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or residential entryways.
description: A modern, rectangular wood cabinet with two light wood doors, a central dark panel, and metal legs. It features a natural wood grain finish and small round handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing two light wood doors, a central dark panel, and small round handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the wood grain finish and the cabinet's depth, with no visible doors or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a continuous wood grain panel with no openings or hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the wood grain and depth.
